items.title: U.S. sharp in narrow WC sendoff loss to Germany
items.summary: The United States lost 2-1 to Germany at Soldier Field in Chicago on Saturday in its last match before the start of the FIFA World Cup, turning in another solid performance afte...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Portugal's Rafael Leão Sent Off For Punching In World Cup Warmup Win Over Chile
items.summary: Portugal forward Rafael Leão has been sent off for punching an opponent in a 2-1 win over Chile in a World Cup warmup in Lisbon.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Destiny fulfilled: How prodigy Mirra Andreeva won ...
items.summary: On Saturday, Mirra Andreeva became the youngest French Open winner since 1992. And she did it in dominant fashion, knowing the pressure was on.
